evals.prompt: Recognize an external folder of family medical PDFs and photos into Markdown, route documents by person, and keep source files outside the vault.
evals.expected_output: Agent loads the skill, checks AGENT_HEALTH_* configuration, runs recognition, and reports index/unassigned results without medical interpretation.

evals.prompt: Refresh the Markdown medical-document corpus after new scans were added. Do not send unchanged files through the OCR engine again.
evals.expected_output: Agent delegates OCR to ocr/scripts/ocr.py using AGENT_HEALTH_OCR_ENGINE, reuses source/profile cache, and preserves unchanged outputs.

evals.prompt: Verify that recognized family medical documents are reproducible and that the external source folder was not modified.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs --check, verifies source manifest and generated Markdown, and reports mismatches without writing.
